_source: SF Mayor's Office of Housing and Community Development — 2026 Maximum Income by Household Size, derived from HUD Area Median Income (AMI) for the HUD Metro Fair Market Rent Area containing San Francisco. Effective 06/01/2026. https://www.sf.gov/find-your-area-median-income-ami-level
_note: Used only for the SFMTA Free Muni program, which is pegged to Bay Area AMI rather than FPL. 100% of median by household size.
